body_txt:
When a character howls or screams in a raw, somewhat primal fashion to express their grief and anguish. Obviously, it's done most often by canines, but not limited to them. Can overlap with Clifftop Caterwauling , when this is done at the edge of a cliff, as well as Skyward Scream . Similar to Big "NO!" and Death Wail .
See also Wolves Always Howl at the Moon and Spooky Animal Sounds , for other howling tropes. Compare Cathartic Scream .
